repo_prior_art.cite: eid_data_fusion_k_source_v1 poses an overlap-hedge converse but has no selector-aware edge-local parity CS-SCM construction.

published_prior_art.cite: LeeGhassamiShpitser2024Systematic supplies CS-SCM semantics, while finite edge-local parity compatibility is a routine witness-validation step.

repo_prior_art.cite: eid_data_fusion_k_source_v1 does not state the whole-arm, label-uniform conditional-law cancellation criterion.

published_prior_art.cite: LeeGhassamiShpitser2024Systematic covers Algorithm 2 line 3 and LeeCorreaBareinboim2020General preserves supplied experiment laws, but neither verifies this selector-conditioned whole-arm coupling cancellation.
ShpitserPearl2006Joint supplies the parity-witness ancestor; this is its selector-conditioned finite normalization check.

repo_prior_art.cite: eid_data_fusion_k_source_v1 is a broader source-cover/overlap-hedge proposal, not a characterization of the remaining SS-ID terminal trace by a whole-arm CS-hedge.

published_prior_art.cite: LeeGhassamiShpitser2024Systematic, Theorem 5, proves nonidentification for Algorithm 1 lines 4 and 14 and Algorithm 2 line 3, leaving the distinct terminal converse outside that theorem.
LeeGhassamiShpitser2024Systematic already gives soundness and the other failure certificates; this is the conditional closure once Open-ended Question 1 is resolved.

accepted_scope_caveats.label: Open-ended Question 1 / Theorem 2 / honest_scope
accepted_scope_caveats.caveat: Universal extraction from the remaining terminal trace is not assumed proved; the parity result and resulting completeness frontier are restricted to finite binary, label-coherent CS-SCM inputs with positive supplied and target selector mass.
accepted_scope_caveats.bound_claim: If Open-ended Question 1 is answered affirmatively, SS-ID succeeds if and only if Q is identifiable on the stated finite-binary positive-support CS-SCM domain.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Add a location anchor in the prose for the exact remaining Algorithm 2 terminal return and quote the adjacent completeness-conjecture language from LeeGhassamiShpitser2024Systematic.
Prove an alphabet-lifting or binary-witness sufficiency result, so the terminal certificate reaches the paper's unrestricted finite-state CS-SCM setting rather than only the binary subdomain.
Turn the extraction handle into a formal terminating decision procedure with an explicit input encoding and complexity bound for recognizing a CS-hedge in a terminal trace.

recommended_next_step: Advance to Stage 0 with the field-tier conditional scope fixed; preserve the terminal-return anchor and finite-binary restriction in the derivation brief.
